query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_customers,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN totalOrders > 0 THEN 1 END) as customers_with_orders,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN totalSpent > 0 THEN 1 END) as customers_with_spend,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN lastPurchaseDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as customers_with_last_purchase,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN lastShipmentAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as customers_with_last_shipment,
  MIN(lastPurchaseDate) as earliest_purchase,
  MAX(lastPurchaseDate) as latest_purchase,
  AVG(totalOrders) as avg_orders,
  AVG(totalSpent) as avg_spent,
  MAX(totalOrders) as max_orders,
  MAX(totalSpent) as max_spent
FROM customers;
